## Summary
One-line description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Python version:
- OS:
- Branch / commit:

## Severity
- [ ] Critical — blocks usage
- [ ] Major — significant impact, workaround exists
- [ ] Minor — cosmetic or edge case

## Root Cause (to be filled in during investigation)

## Fix Description (to be filled in at PR time)
